title: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic’s pre-training team
summary: Andrej Karpathy has joined Anthropic to work on pre-training. He previously co-founded and worked at OpenAI and led computer vision and AI at Tesla.

title: The minimalist Light Phone teams up with Andrew Yang’s Noble Mobile, which pays you to stop doomscrolling
summary: "The Light Phone is designed to be used as little as possible," founder Joe Hollier told TechCrunch.

title: Hackers have compromised dozens of popular open source packages in an ongoing supply chain attack
summary: The attacks are part of a wider campaign known as Mini Shai-Hulud, which has already compromised several open source projects and, in turn, developers and companies that use them.

title: US cyber agency CISA exposed reams of passwords and cloud keys to the open web
summary: The federal cybersecurity agency left plaintext passwords in a spreadsheet uploaded to a public GitHub repository, per a report by independent journalist Brian Krebs.

summary: A new app from Survivor 48 winner Kyle Fraser and castmate Kamilla Karthigesu aims to turn goal tracking into a social experience, pairing users for accountability, daily challenges, and shared progress clips.

title: Forget the feed: Status AI raises $17M to turn social media into interactive entertainment

title: Stilta raises $10.5M from a16z and YC to help companies rediscover the patents they forgot they had
